generated_oml:
instance DigitalTwinSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Decentralized architecture with Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User entities deployed on separate hardware components"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity handling data pre-processing, actuation, and device communication"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity managing data and control mechanisms"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity with visualization and control panel subcomponents"
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for vehicle speed and steering angle information"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance ProjectedPathDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera data from Intel D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed, steering angle, and state information"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks derived from LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ProjectedPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProjectedPathDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control model for determining lead vehicle position and computing optimal following speed"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering and object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and AI processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for system modeling and simulation of complex dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI for real-time viewing, saving, and generating reports of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeReportInsight, DataVisualizationInsight, ReportGenerationAction, ObjectDetectionInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system to cloud resources to determine lead vehicle, compute desired speed based on distance, and send commands back to the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedComputationInsight, CommandSendingAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speed, and sending emergency braking commands remotely"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableAction, SpeedSettingAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time reports of vehicle state and object tracks for situational awareness"
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of projected driving paths and detected objects in UI"
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate detailed reports from collected vehicle data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ObjectDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection and tracking of objects using point cloud clustering"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle using sensor data"
]

instance SpeedComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Compute optimal following speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance CommandSendingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send computed speed commands back to physical vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedSettingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send emergency braking command to vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals for Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC), motor actuation, and steering servo are sent from the Controlling FE to physical components via Wi-Fi UDP. Data Translation serializes control messages and performs unit conversions as part of inter-entity communication."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization requirement of 100 ms accuracy for safety-critical vehicular applications due to hardware limitations, enabling computation offloading between devices."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architecture based on ISO 23247 RA, with software components mapped to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as individual ROS2 packages; each FE's functionality is encapsulated in ROS2 nodes, organized into Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User Entities deployed on different hardware."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Intra-Digital Twin software component communication occurs via ROS2, and inter-entity communication between physical and digital entities uses Wi-Fi network with UDP transport layer protocol."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Complies with ISO 23247 standard (Part 2: Reference Architecture), which defines an entity-based structure comprising Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, User Entity, and Functional Entities. Interoperability is supported through implementations such as OPC Unified Architecture."
]
